summary: The current corpus has no external_formal or user_reviewed_human_curated positive tasks after relabelling unreviewed human_curated_formal entries to synthetic_generated; synthetic positives are 6700/6700.
unblock_plan: Add at least 900 positive tasks with valid external_formal source/license refs or explicit user/named-reviewer ReviewManifestV1 evidence.
Keep synthetic_generated positives at or below 50% of positives.
Regenerate and freeze corpus_manifest.json after provenance gates pass.

summary: The current corpus profiles all positive tasks as direct lemma/depth-1 tasks, so substantive reasoning floors and the direct lemma ceiling fail.
unblock_plan: Add or import substantive GeometryFull2D tasks with required reasoning depth, construction, side-condition, order/case, transformation, and metric/algebraic/inequality profiles.
Ensure direct-lemma-only tasks are at most 20% of counted positive successes.
Provide valid review evidence for any non-synthetic profile override.

summary: The release run directory now contains one replay-valid B2 ActualTaskPipelineRunV1 record, but the required full comparable matrix across corpus families and baselines is still missing; used-rule coverage, family metrics, and advantage thresholds do not pass.
unblock_plan: Run or replay valid ActualTaskPipelineRunV1 records for the frozen v0.4.3 corpus and required baselines B1/B2/B5/B6/B7/B8.
Produce enough counted final-theorem successes to satisfy family thresholds, advantage thresholds, and used-rule coverage floors from certificate-bound compiler rules.
Recompute matrix, used-rule coverage, metrics, and advantage summaries from those records.
